Bug: TimeoutError: Agent is not challenging (commit 88f58f0)
Root Cause: acc2 passed to CurriculumOpponent instead of BattleEnv.agent2
Fix: Move acc2 to BattleEnv.agent2 + add challenge_timeout=180
Rationale: CurriculumOpponent is pure move-selector, must not open Showdown connection
